overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path. The weather transitions from a bright partly cloudy afternoon to a heavy rainstorm as he progresses from riverside meadows into a dense forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside meadow path with blooming wildflowers

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the sunlit dirt path beside a river, carrying swords on his back, surrounded by colorful wildflowers and green meadows

entered.detail: calm water body running parallel to the dirt path
tall stone tower structure visible on the distant horizon
muddy trail winding through the meadow grass
low stone wall running alongside the left side of the path
red poppies and purple lupines dotting the grass on both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a bright sunlit path beside a calm river, surrounded by blooming wildflowers and lush green meadows. A stone wall appears on the left side as he progresses, with distant rock formations visible ahead against a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open country path transitioning to overcast conditions

events.description: ambient light dims significantly as storm clouds gather and cover the sky
light rain begins to fall and visibility starts to reduce

agents.ego_description: continuing along the country path as the weather deteriorates, with stone walls lining the route and the sky darkening overhead

entered.detail: jagged rock outcroppings visible on the distant horizon
continuation of the stone wall now appearing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from sunny to overcast as Geralt continues along the path. The river and distant tower fade from view behind him while the stone wall shifts from left to right. Rain begins to fall around the 25-second mark, signaling the approaching storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy country path with stone wall and wooden well structure

events.description: rain intensifies into a heavy downpour with visible rain particles and reduced visibility
approaching and passing a wooden well structure at the edge of the forest

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly heavy rain toward a wooden structure, with water visible on the ground and visibility reducing

entered.detail: wooden roofed structure resembling a well or small shelter beside the path

segments.scene_description: The rain intensifies into a heavy downpour as Geralt approaches a wooden well structure on the left. The stone wall continues alongside the path but gradually recedes into the distance. The environment becomes noticeably darker and wetter as the storm takes hold.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path in heavy storm with canopy cover

events.description: entering dense forest canopy with significantly reduced visibility and darker atmosphere

agents.ego_description: trudging through the heavy rain into a dense forest area, with trees forming a canopy overhead and visibility severely limited by the storm

entered.detail: thick trees and vegetation creating an enclosed canopy over the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a dense forest as the storm reaches its peak intensity. The wooden well and stone walls are left behind as the path becomes enclosed by thick trees forming a dark canopy overhead. Heavy rain continues to fall, reducing visibility and creating a dark, atmospheric environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a bright, sunlit riverside meadow transforms into a dark, rain-drenched forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a path beside a calm river and blooming wildflowers, with a stone wall appearing on the left under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera progresses, the sunlight fades into an overcast gloom and the river disappears from view, while light rain begins to fall and the stone wall shifts to the right. The scene then intensifies into a heavy downpour as the camera passes a wooden well and the environment grows noticeably darker and wetter. Finally, the path leads into a dense forest where the stone walls are left behind and a thick canopy of trees closes overhead, reducing visibility amidst the peak of the storm.
